column1: # Farsi (Persian) harakat — the six diacritical marks (vowel/consonant marks).
# `mark` is the bare diacritic on a dotted circle (◌) — the standard way to show
# a mark in isolation, so no carrier letter is treated as special. ex1..ex4 show
# the mark on a FIXED carrier set (ب ت س م) for consistency, with romanization.
# (آ madd and ء hamze are letter-like, so they live in the alphabet, not here.)
